2605.12375.title: Agent-Based Post-Hoc Correction of Agricultural Yield Forecasts
2605.12375.paper_summary: Accurate crop yield forecasting in commercial soft fruit production is constrained by the data available in typical commercial farm records, which lack the sensor networks, satellite imagery, and high-resolution meteorological inputs that most state-of-the-art approaches assume. We propose a structured LLM agent framework that performs post-hoc correction of existing model predictions, encoding agricultural domain knowledge across tools for phase detection, bias learning, and range validation. Evaluated on a proprietary strawberry yield dataset and a public USDA corn harvest dataset, agent refinement of XGBoost reduced MAE by 20% and MASE by 56% on strawberry, with consistent improvements across Moirai2 (MAE 24%, MASE 22%) and Random Forest (MAE 28%, MASE 66%) baselines. Using Llama 3.1 8B as the agent produced the strongest corrections across all configurations; LLaVA 13B showed inconsistent gains, highlighting sensitivity to the choice of refinement model.
2605.12375.paper_summary_zh: 準確的商業軟果類作物產量預測受到典型商業農場記錄中可用數據的限制，這些數據缺乏大多數最先進方法所假設的傳感器網絡、衛星影像和高解析度氣象輸入。我們提出了一個結構化的LLM代理框架，對現有模型預測進行事後修正，編碼農業領域知識，涵蓋相位檢測、偏差學習和範圍驗證的工具。在一個專有的草莓產量數據集和一個公共的美國農業部玉米收穫數據集上進行評估，XGBoost的代理優化使草莓的MAE降低了20%，MASE降低了56%，在Moirai2（MAE 24%，MASE 22%）和隨機森林（MAE 28%，MASE 66%）基準上也有一致的改進。使用Llama 3.1 8B作為代理在所有配置中產生了最強的修正；LLaVA 13B則顯示出不一致的增益，突顯了對優化模型選擇的敏感性。
2605.12375.author: Matthew Beddows et.al.
2605.12375.authors: Matthew Beddows, Aiden Durrant, Georgios Leontidis
